decisions.thesis_1liner: Wide-moat medical at SMA50 support. Entry $84 -> target $96.
decisions.thesis: Dividend aristocrat with Hugo robotic-surgery catalyst. SMA50 support holding through last week's macro chop. Q4 earnings late May. Stop on close < $80 (8% downside). Targets $96 in 6-9 months on multiple expansion + Hugo FDA news.

decisions.thesis_1liner: AAPL CSP $250P 35DTE — collect premium in low-IV regime.
decisions.thesis: AAPL premium-collection at 250P 35DTE. Delta 0.20 implies ~80% probability of expiring worthless. Breakeven $245.50 is 4% below current. If assigned, cost basis $245.50 fits long-term thesis. Roll if breached.
